episodes.title: Why This Sandwich Shop is Actually a Dangerous Cult
episodes.description:
The Yellow Deli looks like the coziest place in the world. Warm bread, folk music, and a community that seems to have it all figured out. But behind that cozy door lies a strategy designed to take everything—your home, your children, and your freedom.

In this video, we go beyond the menu to examine the Twelve Tribes. From secret breeding programs and child discipline manuals to the shocking hypocrisy of its founder, we look at the reality hiding in plain sight.

Chapters:
00:00 - A Deli Near You
00:24 - A Cozy Place
00:45 - The Strategy Behind The Sandwich
01:19 - The Cult Behind The Sandwich
01:36 - The Man Behind The Sandwich
04:00 - The Beliefs Behind The Sandwich
07:35 - The Children Behind The Sandwich
09:40 - The Deception Behind The Founder
10:25 - Still Serving Sandwiches Today
